Asker og Bærum brann og redning IKS

https://abbr.no/
Avvik: 113 | Bestått: 443
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" class="image wp-image-4081 attachment-medium size-medium" decoding="async" height="200" loading="lazy" sizes="(max-width: 300px) 100vw, 300px" src="https://abbr.no/wp-content/uploads/2018/
Add descriptive alt text to the image
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h1 class="logo-image-wrapper"> <a class="logo-image" href="https://abbr.no/" title="Asker og Bærum brann og redning IKS"> <img alt="Asker og Bærum brann og redning IKS" class="idium-site-logo" src="h
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h2 class="home-section__title" style="text-align: left;"> </h2>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (6 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3> What is a cookie and local storage of data? </h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="accessibility-top clearfix"> <ul class="clearfix"> <li> <a class="main_content" href="#middle"> Jump to main content </a> </li> <li> <a class="main_navigation" h
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="header__support-menu hide-below-large" role="navigation"> <ul class="support-menu-nav o-menu" role="menubar"> <li role="menuitem"> <a href="https://abbr.no/kontakt/" title="Kontakt">
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="header__main-nav" id="nav"> <ul class="wrapper o-menu" role="menubar"> <li class="dropdown" role="menuitem"> <a href="https://abbr.no/om-abbv-2/" title="megamenu"> Om oss
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="header__support-menu hide-below-large" role="navigation"> <ul class="support-menu-nav o-menu" role="menubar"> <li role="menuitem"> <a href="https://abbr.no/kontakt/" title="Kontakt">

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

Link text is very long (175 characters)

Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive

<a class="slideshow__btn btn-next fa fa-angle-right" href="#"></a>

Link text is not descriptive: 'here'

2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button class="search-form__submit fa fa-search" tabindex="-1" type="submit">Søk</button>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (81 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="//www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-T6ZFNW" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe allow="encrypted-media" allowtransparency="true" frameborder="0" height="480" scrolling="no" src="https://www.facebook.com/plugins/page.php?href=abbriks&tabs=timeline&width=340&hei
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h1 class="logo-image-wrapper"> <a class="logo-image" href="https://abbr.no/" title="Asker og Bærum brann og redning IKS"> <img alt="Asker og Bærum brann og redning IKS" class="idium-site-logo" src="h

<h2 class="wp-block-heading"></h2>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed

MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3> What is a cookie and local storage of data? </h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3

MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page

MODERATE

https://abbr.no/bolig/brannsikkerhet-i-hjemmet/redde-varsle-slokke/
Avvik: 107 | Bestått: 443
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" class="image wp-image-4081 attachment-medium size-medium" decoding="async" height="200" loading="lazy" sizes="(max-width: 300px) 100vw, 300px" src="https://abbr.no/wp-content/uploads/2018/

2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h1 class="logo-image-wrapper"> <a class="logo-image" href="https://abbr.no/" title="Asker og Bærum brann og redning IKS"> <img alt="Asker og Bærum brann og redning IKS" class="idium-site-logo" src="h

Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

<h2 class="wp-block-heading"></h2>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (8 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>1. REDDE</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3> What is a cookie and local storage of data? </h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="accessibility-top clearfix"> <ul class="clearfix"> <li> <a class="main_content" href="#middle"> Jump to main content </a> </li> <li> <a class="main_navigation" h
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="header__support-menu hide-below-large" role="navigation"> <ul class="support-menu-nav o-menu" role="menubar"> <li role="menuitem"> <a href="https://abbr.no/kontakt/" title="Kontakt">
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="header__main-nav" id="nav"> <ul class="wrapper o-menu" role="menubar"> <li class="dropdown" role="menuitem"> <a href="https://abbr.no/om-abbv-2/" title="megamenu"> Om oss
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="breadcrumbs"> <span>You are here:</span> <ul> <li> <a href="https://abbr.no" title="Home"> Home </a> </li><li> <a href="/bolig/" title="Bolig"> Bolig
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="header__support-menu hide-below-large" role="navigation"> <ul class="support-menu-nav o-menu" role="menubar"> <li role="menuitem"> <a href="https://abbr.no/kontakt/" title="Kontakt">
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (13 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://abbr.pj.360online.com/" tabindex="-1" target="_blank" title="Offentlig postliste"> Offentlig postliste </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://opengov.360online.com/Meetings/ABBR" tabindex="-1" target="_blank" title="Utvalgsmøter"> Utvalgsmøter </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://abbr.pj.360online.com/" target="_blank" title="Offentlig postliste"> Offentlig postliste </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://opengov.360online.com/Meetings/ABBR" target="_blank" title="Utvalgsmøter"> Utvalgsmøter </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/2086717f-4d8c-49f1-b8a1-7bbe39c0d149" target="_blank">Tilgjengelighetserklæring</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://intranett.abbr.no/" target="_blank">Nettbrann (Intranett)</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="https://abbr.no/bjornis/"><img alt="" class="image wp-image-4081 attachment-medium size-medium" decoding="async" height="200" loading="lazy" sizes="(max-width: 300px) 100vw, 300px" src="https
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="footer__copyright__link" href="https://www.idium.no/tjenester/wordpress/" target="_blank" title="Idium WordPress"> <span>idium</span>WordPress </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="cookie-button" href="javascript:void(0)" id="idium-cookies-notification-hide"> I approve </a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="idium-cookies-link" href="javascript:void(0)" id="idium-cookies-notification-show"> More information </a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://abbr.no/personvernerklaering/" target="_blank">Privacy Policy</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'here'

<a href="https://www.idium.no/vare-tjenesters-personvern/" target="_blank">here</a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.idium.no/vare-tjenesters-personvern/" target="_blank">here</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button class="search-form__submit fa fa-search" tabindex="-1" type="submit">Søk</button>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (81 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="//www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-T6ZFNW" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<nav class="header__support-menu hide-below-large" role="navigation"> <ul class="support-menu-nav o-menu" role="menubar"> <li role="menuitem"> <a href="https://abbr.no/kontakt/" title="Kontakt">
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='complementary' needs an accessible name

<aside class="sidebar" id="sidebar" role="complementary"> <section class="widget widget_nav_menu"> <h1 class="widget-title"> Brannsikkerhet i bolig og fritidsbolig </h1> <div class="menu-brannsi
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Unngå skogbrann | Asker og Bærum brann og redning IKS

https://abbr.no/fritid/skogbrann/
Avvik: 108 | Bestått: 432
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" class="image wp-image-4081 attachment-medium size-medium" decoding="async" height="200" loading="lazy" sizes="(max-width: 300px) 100vw, 300px" src="https://abbr.no/wp-content/uploads/2018/
Add descriptive alt text to the image
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h1 class="logo-image-wrapper"> <a class="logo-image" href="https://abbr.no/" title="Asker og Bærum brann og redning IKS"> <img alt="Asker og Bærum brann og redning IKS" class="idium-site-logo" src="h
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h2 class="wp-block-heading"></h2>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (7 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3> What is a cookie and local storage of data? </h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="accessibility-top clearfix"> <ul class="clearfix"> <li> <a class="main_content" href="#middle"> Jump to main content </a> </li> <li> <a class="main_navigation" h
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

MODERATE

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" class="image wp-image-4081 attachment-medium size-medium" decoding="async" height="200" loading="lazy" sizes="(max-width: 300px) 100vw, 300px" src="https://abbr.no/wp-content/uploads/2018/
Add descriptive alt text to the image
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h1 class="logo-image-wrapper"> <a class="logo-image" href="https://abbr.no/" title="Asker og Bærum brann og redning IKS"> <img alt="Asker og Bærum brann og redning IKS" class="idium-site-logo" src="h

Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

<h2 class="wp-block-heading"></h2>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (8 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Barna er gode ambassadører</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3

MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3> What is a cookie and local storage of data? </h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3

MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page

MODERATE

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="http://www.brannvesenetsjulekalender.no" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">www.brannvesenetsjulekalender.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a data-event-action="Klikk på mailtolenker" data-event-category="Henvendelser (mailto)" data-event-label="https://abbr.no/brannvesenets-julekalender" href="mailto:forebyggende@abbr.no" rel="noopener"
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/2086717f-4d8c-49f1-b8a1-7bbe39c0d149" target="_blank">Tilgjengelighetserklæring</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://intranett.abbr.no/" target="_blank">Nettbrann (Intranett)</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="https://abbr.no/bjornis/"><img alt="" class="image wp-image-4081 attachment-medium size-medium" decoding="async" height="200" loading="lazy" sizes="(max-width: 300px) 100vw, 300px" src="https
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="footer__copyright__link" href="https://www.idium.no/tjenester/wordpress/" target="_blank" title="Idium WordPress"> <span>idium</span>WordPress </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="cookie-button" href="javascript:void(0)" id="idium-cookies-notification-hide"> I approve </a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="idium-cookies-link" href="javascript:void(0)" id="idium-cookies-notification-show"> More information </a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://abbr.no/personvernerklaering/" target="_blank">Privacy Policy</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'here'

<a href="https://www.idium.no/vare-tjenesters-personvern/" target="_blank">here</a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.idium.no/vare-tjenesters-personvern/" target="_blank">here</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button class="search-form__submit fa fa-search" tabindex="-1" type="submit">Søk</button>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (81 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="//www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-T6ZFNW" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<nav class="header__support-menu hide-below-large" role="navigation"> <ul class="support-menu-nav o-menu" role="menubar"> <li role="menuitem"> <a href="https://abbr.no/kontakt/" title="Kontakt">
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='complementary' needs an accessible name

<aside class="sidebar" id="sidebar" role="complementary"> <section class="widget right-sidebar-widget text-5 widget_text"> <div class="textwidget"></div> </section><section class="widget right-sidebar
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

https://abbr.no/om-abbv-2/brannsjefen/
Avvik: 107 | Bestått: 434
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)

CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" class="image wp-image-4081 attachment-medium size-medium" decoding="async" height="200" loading="lazy" sizes="(max-width: 300px) 100vw, 300px" src="https://abbr.no/wp-content/uploads/2018/
Add descriptive alt text to the image
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h1 class="logo-image-wrapper"> <a class="logo-image" href="https://abbr.no/" title="Asker og Bærum brann og redning IKS"> <img alt="Asker og Bærum brann og redning IKS" class="idium-site-logo" src="h
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h2 class="wp-block-heading"></h2>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (7 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3> What is a cookie and local storage of data? </h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="accessibility-top clearfix"> <ul class="clearfix"> <li> <a class="main_content" href="#middle"> Jump to main content </a> </li> <li> <a class="main_navigation" h

MODERATE

2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)

SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button class="search-form__submit fa fa-search" tabindex="-1" type="submit">Søk</button>

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

https://abbr.no/feiing-og-tilsyn/har-du-fatt-fyringsforbud/
Avvik: 106 | Bestått: 439
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" class="image wp-image-4081 attachment-medium size-medium" decoding="async" height="200" loading="lazy" sizes="(max-width: 300px) 100vw, 300px" src="https://abbr.no/wp-content/uploads/2018/
Add descriptive alt text to the image
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h1 class="logo-image-wrapper"> <a class="logo-image" href="https://abbr.no/" title="Asker og Bærum brann og redning IKS"> <img alt="Asker og Bærum brann og redning IKS" class="idium-site-logo" src="h
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h2 class="wp-block-heading"></h2>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (7 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3> What is a cookie and local storage of data? </h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="accessibility-top clearfix"> <ul class="clearfix"> <li> <a class="main_content" href="#middle"> Jump to main content </a> </li> <li> <a class="main_navigation" h
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)

SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button class="search-form__submit fa fa-search" tabindex="-1" type="submit">Søk</button>

MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<nav class="header__support-menu hide-below-large" role="navigation"> <ul class="support-menu-nav o-menu" role="menubar"> <li role="menuitem"> <a href="https://abbr.no/kontakt/" title="Kontakt">
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='complementary' needs an accessible name

<aside class="sidebar" id="sidebar" role="complementary"> <section class="widget widget_nav_menu"> <h1 class="widget-title"> Feiing </h1> <div class="menu-feiing-container"><ul class="menu" id="
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (7 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3> What is a cookie and local storage of data? </h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3

MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page

MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3> What is a cookie and local storage of data? </h3>

Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (8 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Sikkerhetskrav</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3> What is a cookie and local storage of data? </h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="accessibility-top clearfix"> <ul class="clearfix"> <li> <a class="main_content" href="#middle"> Jump to main content </a> </li> <li> <a class="main_navigation" h
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="header__support-menu hide-below-large" role="navigation"> <ul class="support-menu-nav o-menu" role="menubar"> <li role="menuitem"> <a href="https://abbr.no/kontakt/" title="Kontakt">
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="header__main-nav" id="nav"> <ul class="wrapper o-menu" role="menubar"> <li class="dropdown" role="menuitem"> <a href="https://abbr.no/om-abbv-2/" title="megamenu"> Om oss
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="breadcrumbs"> <span>You are here:</span> <ul> <li> <a href="https://abbr.no" title="Home"> Home </a> </li><li class="active-crumb"> Melding om varme arbeider
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="header__support-menu hide-below-large" role="navigation"> <ul class="support-menu-nav o-menu" role="menubar"> <li role="menuitem"> <a href="https://abbr.no/kontakt/" title="Kontakt">
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (15 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://abbr.pj.360online.com/" tabindex="-1" target="_blank" title="Offentlig postliste"> Offentlig postliste </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://opengov.360online.com/Meetings/ABBR" tabindex="-1" target="_blank" title="Utvalgsmøter"> Utvalgsmøter </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

MODERATE

<a href="https://abbr.pj.360online.com/" target="_blank" title="Offentlig postliste"> Offentlig postliste </a>

<a href="https://brannvernforeningen.no/sikkerhetsforskrift-for-utforelse-av-varme-arbeider-1.1.20241.pdf?pid=Native-ContentFile-File" rel="noopener" target="_blank">Sikkerhetsforskrift for utførelse

<a href="https://brannvernforeningen.no/veiledning-til-sikkerhetsforskrift-for-varme-arbeider-1.1.2024.pdf?pid=Native-ContentFile-File" rel="noopener" target="_blank">Veiledning til sikkerhetforskrift

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/2086717f-4d8c-49f1-b8a1-7bbe39c0d149" target="_blank">Tilgjengelighetserklæring</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://intranett.abbr.no/" target="_blank">Nettbrann (Intranett)</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="https://abbr.no/bjornis/"><img alt="" class="image wp-image-4081 attachment-medium size-medium" decoding="async" height="200" loading="lazy" sizes="(max-width: 300px) 100vw, 300px" src="https
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="footer__copyright__link" href="https://www.idium.no/tjenester/wordpress/" target="_blank" title="Idium WordPress"> <span>idium</span>WordPress </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="cookie-button" href="javascript:void(0)" id="idium-cookies-notification-hide"> I approve </a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="idium-cookies-link" href="javascript:void(0)" id="idium-cookies-notification-show"> More information </a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://abbr.no/personvernerklaering/" target="_blank">Privacy Policy</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'here'

<a href="https://www.idium.no/vare-tjenesters-personvern/" target="_blank">here</a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.idium.no/vare-tjenesters-personvern/" target="_blank">here</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button class="search-form__submit fa fa-search" tabindex="-1" type="submit">Søk</button>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'false' appears 4 times

id="false"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (81 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="//www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-T6ZFNW" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<nav class="header__support-menu hide-below-large" role="navigation"> <ul class="support-menu-nav o-menu" role="menubar"> <li role="menuitem"> <a href="https://abbr.no/kontakt/" title="Kontakt">
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='complementary' needs an accessible name

<aside class="sidebar" id="sidebar" role="complementary"> <section class="widget right-sidebar-widget text-5 widget_text"> <div class="textwidget"></div> </section><section class="widget right-sidebar
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Plassering av avfallsbeholdere og containere | Asker og Bærum brann og redning IKS

https://abbr.no/bolig/avfallsbeholder/
Avvik: 106 | Bestått: 429
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" class="image wp-image-4081 attachment-medium size-medium" decoding="async" height="200" loading="lazy" sizes="(max-width: 300px) 100vw, 300px" src="https://abbr.no/wp-content/uploads/2018/
Add descriptive alt text to the image
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h1 class="logo-image-wrapper"> <a class="logo-image" href="https://abbr.no/" title="Asker og Bærum brann og redning IKS"> <img alt="Asker og Bærum brann og redning IKS" class="idium-site-logo" src="h
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h2 class="wp-block-heading"></h2>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (7 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3> What is a cookie and local storage of data? </h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="accessibility-top clearfix"> <ul class="clearfix"> <li> <a class="main_content" href="#middle"> Jump to main content </a> </li> <li> <a class="main_navigation" h
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="header__support-menu hide-below-large" role="navigation"> <ul class="support-menu-nav o-menu" role="menubar"> <li role="menuitem"> <a href="https://abbr.no/kontakt/" title="Kontakt">
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="header__main-nav" id="nav"> <ul class="wrapper o-menu" role="menubar"> <li class="dropdown" role="menuitem"> <a href="https://abbr.no/om-abbv-2/" title="megamenu"> Om oss
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="idium-cookies-link" href="javascript:void(0)" id="idium-cookies-notification-show"> More information </a>

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://abbr.no/personvernerklaering/" target="_blank">Privacy Policy</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'here'

<a href="https://www.idium.no/vare-tjenesters-personvern/" target="_blank">here</a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')

2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button class="search-form__submit fa fa-search" tabindex="-1" type="submit">Søk</button>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (81 avvik)

iframe is missing title attribute

MODERATE

MODERATE

<aside class="sidebar" id="sidebar" role="complementary"> <section class="widget right-sidebar-widget text-5 widget_text"> <div class="textwidget"></div> </section><section class="widget right-sidebar

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (7 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3> What is a cookie and local storage of data? </h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://intranett.abbr.no/" target="_blank">Nettbrann (Intranett)</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="https://abbr.no/bjornis/"><img alt="" class="image wp-image-4081 attachment-medium size-medium" decoding="async" height="200" loading="lazy" sizes="(max-width: 300px) 100vw, 300px" src="https
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="footer__copyright__link" href="https://www.idium.no/tjenester/wordpress/" target="_blank" title="Idium WordPress"> <span>idium</span>WordPress </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="cookie-button" href="javascript:void(0)" id="idium-cookies-notification-hide"> I approve </a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link uses javascript: URL

<a class="idium-cookies-link" href="javascript:void(0)" id="idium-cookies-notification-show"> More information </a>
Use a button element for actions, or use href with progressive enhancement
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://abbr.no/personvernerklaering/" target="_blank">Privacy Policy</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'here'

<a href="https://www.idium.no/vare-tjenesters-personvern/" target="_blank">here</a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.idium.no/vare-tjenesters-personvern/" target="_blank">here</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button class="search-form__submit fa fa-search" tabindex="-1" type="submit">Søk</button>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (81 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="//www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-T6ZFNW" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='navigation' needs an accessible name

<nav class="header__support-menu hide-below-large" role="navigation"> <ul class="support-menu-nav o-menu" role="menubar"> <li role="menuitem"> <a href="https://abbr.no/kontakt/" title="Kontakt">
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='complementary' needs an accessible name

<aside class="sidebar" id="sidebar" role="complementary"> <section class="widget widget_nav_menu"> <h1 class="widget-title"> Opplæring </h1> <div class="menu-opplaering-container"><ul class="men
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

https://abbr.no/feiing-og-tilsyn/nye-ildsteder-sparer-miljoet/
Avvik: 107 | Bestått: 439
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" class="image wp-image-4081 attachment-medium size-medium" decoding="async" height="200" loading="lazy" sizes="(max-width: 300px) 100vw, 300px" src="https://abbr.no/wp-content/uploads/2018/
Add descriptive alt text to the image
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h1 class="logo-image-wrapper"> <a class="logo-image" href="https://abbr.no/" title="Asker og Bærum brann og redning IKS"> <img alt="Asker og Bærum brann og redning IKS" class="idium-site-logo" src="h
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h2 class="wp-block-heading"></h2>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (7 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3> What is a cookie and local storage of data? </h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="accessibility-top clearfix"> <ul class="clearfix"> <li> <a class="main_content" href="#middle"> Jump to main content </a> </li> <li> <a class="main_navigation" h
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

MODERATE

MODERATE

2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button class="search-form__submit fa fa-search" tabindex="-1" type="submit">Søk</button>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state

MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>

MODERATE

Element with role='complementary' needs an accessible name

<aside class="sidebar" id="sidebar" role="complementary"> <section class="widget right-sidebar-widget text-5 widget_text"> <div class="textwidget"></div> </section><section class="widget right-sidebar
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3> What is a cookie and local storage of data? </h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>

MODERATE

Element with role='complementary' needs an accessible name

<aside class="sidebar" id="sidebar" role="complementary"> <section class="widget right-sidebar-widget text-5 widget_text"> <div class="textwidget"></div> </section><section class="widget right-sidebar
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container
